data.title: bd-39f6: refactor bus wait interface to match bus inbox
data.description: Changes --mention to --mentions (any-channel mentions) and --channel to --channels (multi-channel support via comma-separated or repeated flag). Breaking changes to bus wait CLI interface. Adds test for multi-channel offset collection.

data.reason: Security review: LGTM. No security concerns. Channel names from --channels are used for filtering comparisons only, not for path construction. Path traversal defense in channel_path() is not affected. No injection, auth, or secrets issues.
